headline: SOUTHWEST AIRLINES DECLARES 189th QUARTERLY DIVIDEND
summary: DALLAS, May 7, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Southwest Airlines Co.  Board of Directors declared a quarterly cash dividend of $.18 per share to Shareholders of record at the close of business on June 11,...

headline: US Airlines Spent $5 Billion On Fuel In March Alone As Energy Crisis Deepens: Here's How Airline Stocks Have Fared Since Iran War Began
summary: Airline fuel costs surged 56% in March to over $5 billion due to war with Iran and oil market disruption, according to fresh BTS data.
